39.reason: [This loop attempts to remove trailing zeros but does not properly null-terminate the string if all digits after decimal are zeros, potentially leaving garbage in 't'.]

44.reason: [If there's no decimal point (sum==0), the exponent should be the number of digits after the first minus one, but 'sum' is 0 here which is incorrect. Also, 'i' after loop is strlen(s), so exponent should be i-1, not sum.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.25 , reason:  [If there's no decimal point (sum==0), 'i' equals strlen(s), so 'i==1' only true for single-digit input, but exponent should be i-1, not 'sum' which is 0. Logic error in exponent calculation.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [If there's no decimal point (sum==0), the exponent should be the number of digits after the first minus one, but 'sum' is 0 here which is incorrect. Also, 'i' after loop is strlen(s), so exponent should be i-1, not sum.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Variable 'i' after loop ends is equal to strlen(s), not 1; condition 'i==1' is logically incorrect. Also, 'sum' remains 0, which gives wrong exponent.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [If there's no decimal point (sum==0), exponent should be length of integer part minus 1, not 'sum' which is 0. Also, i==1 means only one digit, so exponent should be 0, but logic is flawed.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [If there's no decimal point (sum==0), exponent should be based on number of digits minus one, not 'sum' which is 0. Also, 'i' after loop equals strlen(s), so i==1 only if input length is 1, but then there's no decimal handling. Logic is flawed.]
